comments.text: It's actually the left-hand side of the final statement that was missing in the truncated photocopy available of [Va99]. But it appears near the very bottom of [ErHa74,p.272], where it says "Is $\omega_2\rightarrow(\omega_1+\omega)^2_2$ ... consistent with G.C.H.?" [I found this myself, no Google even. Amusingly, when I asked ChatGPT to help, it linked to the LaTeX transcription of [Va99] on my own GitHub.]

Yes. So the final statement is currently incorrect. It needs to be changed from "Establish whether the following is true assuming CH" to "Establish whether the following is consistent with GCH" (The site has been updated to address this comment.)
